rag_rules: Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees) in `annex agree { ... };` blocks within the component type.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
generic_rules: Use the AADL model as the authoritative source for component structure (names, ports, data types).
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees; avoid implementation details in component type contracts.
Use case-provided bounds and visible feature names for range assumptions and guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define boolean helper variables for range checks: `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;`
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation exists.
